ItacPersonItem.Notes: Dominican friar. The author of L` accademia sagro-politica. Raunata dal p. maestro, e reggente di Padoua il p.f. Gio. Maria Muti domenicano. E dedicata all`illustrissimo, & eccellentissimo signor Gio. Carlo Grimani (Milano: 1695), not in BL collections.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
